lookalikes.prompt: A 40s-aged person, appearing male, with medium-deep skin, riding a bicycle on a sunlit city street. The person has a square-shaped face, a slightly narrower jawline than typical, a receding hairline with salt-and-pepper dark brown hair tied in a messy bun. Their eyes are round, hazel, and set closer together. They have a prominent aquiline nose with a pointed tip, and thin, dark, straight eyebrows. Their lips are thin, the upper and lower lips of similar thickness. A short, meticulously groomed full beard and mustache frame the mouth. They are wearing casual clothing, a full-body shot, with their face turned slightly towards the camera, a neutral expression. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
